claim: The blocker in atom ATOM_T002_S020_BLO_01 ("And this problem, this long context, really arises because we're trying to fi...") is dissolved by recognizing the first-principle in atom ATOM_T013_S019_FIR_01 ("fact that it is in principle possible to automate this work. And there should...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The named blocker is an artifact of a frame that the first-principle invalidates; under the principle, the blocker either does not bind or is mis-stated.
